rows.result: Roll both challenge dice. On a match, envision a pointed and dramatic negative outcome.
A person or community you trusted loses faith in you, or acts against you.
A person or community you care about is exposed to danger.
You are separated from something or someone.
Your action has an unintended effect.
Something of value is lost or destroyed.
A new danger or foe is revealed.
It causes a delay or forces a new approach.
A surprising development complicates your quest.
It forces you to act against your best intentions.
A friend, companion, or ally is put in harm's way (or you are, if alone).
Roll twice more on this table. Both results occur. If they are the same, make it worse.
Your ritual has the opposite effect.
Your ritual reveals a disturbing truth.
A hostile presence is drawn to you.
Your ally is put in danger.
You owe a debt to a dark power.
You lose control of your abilities.
An assumption is revealed to be false.
A more dangerous foe is revealed.
You and an enemy share a common goal.
You are betrayed by someone you trusted.
The situation is far worse than you thought.
A power or authority is overthrown.
A surprising turn of events gives you hope.
Something unexpected or out of place
Denizen drives you into a trap
Something is not what it seems
The terrain favors you, or you find a shortcut
An aspect of the history or nature of this place is revealed
You find evidence of a prior explorer
A clue leads you to your objective
You get the drop on a denizen
An aspect of the site works in your favor
You find an item of value
